# Vertical Growth Coaching

> One-on-one midlife transformation coaching with Jacob V. We work with adults in their 40s, 50s, and early 60s who have achieved what they set out to but no longer recognize themselves in the result. The work is identity excavation — removing inherited expectations and role-based identity until what's actually theirs becomes visible again.

Vertical Growth Coaching is a small private coaching practice serving clients worldwide via video. We are not therapy and we don't replace it. We work with people who are stable but stuck — between an old story and a new one — and want a structured process for that transition rather than another self-help framework layered on top.

The core framework is **inside-out vs. outside-in orientation**. Most people reach midlife running a program built from external validation, inherited expectations, and borrowed narratives. The work is reorienting to a self-anchored center, then letting that center express outward into the six life domains: work, family, health, purpose, spirit, and love.

The engagement happens in three phases: **Excavation** (mapping the inherited layers), **Reorientation** (working in the gap between the old story and the new), and **Integration** (the new orientation flowing into daily life). Most clients work with Jacob over a multi-month arc; the practice does not sell time-bound packages.

## Who this is for

- Adults navigating a midlife identity transition
- People who feel hollow after external success
- Executives, founders, and professionals questioning purpose
- Anyone asking "who am I underneath the roles and titles?"
- People stable enough for coaching (not in active crisis — that's therapy first)

## How it differs from related services

- **vs. therapy**: therapy works with what's wounded; this coaching works with what's next. Not a substitute for trauma processing or mental health treatment.
- **vs. executive coaching**: not focused on performance, leadership skills, or career strategy. Focused on the identity layer underneath those.
- **vs. life coaching**: not a generic motivational framework. Specifically built for the midlife transition and identity-level work.

## Pages

- [Home](https://verticalgrowthcoaching.com/): Full single-page site with framework, self-assessment quiz, FAQ, and discovery-call booking.
- [The Framework: Inside-Out vs. Outside-In](https://verticalgrowthcoaching.com/#framework): The core conceptual model.
- [The Process](https://verticalgrowthcoaching.com/#process): Three phases — Excavation, Reorientation, Integration.
- [About Jacob V](https://verticalgrowthcoaching.com/#about): Coach background and philosophy.
- [FAQ](https://verticalgrowthcoaching.com/#faq): Common questions (what it is, who it's for, vs. therapy, length, remote).
- [Self-assessment quiz](https://verticalgrowthcoaching.com/#quiz): 8-question Outside-In score.

## Contact

- [Book a free discovery call](https://verticalgrowthcoaching.com/#book): 30-minute introductory conversation. No pitch, no pressure.
